title: Senior Doctor - Medtronic India Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Medtronic India Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India Ventures Solutions in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India Ventures Solutions:
Medtronic India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India Ventures Solutions!
